question: Can you help me set a new alarm for tomorrow morning? I’d like it to be recurring for weekdays.
task_description: The user needs to set a new alarm for the next morning based on their preferred wake-up time. The assistant should guide them through the process, allowing them to choose their desired alarm sound and set it as a recurring alarm if needed.
task_goal: The user successfully sets a new alarm with their preferred wake-up time, alarm sound, and recurrence pattern (if applicable).
options:
A: Absolutely! I'll set a new alarm for tomorrow morning at 8:30 AM, using your preferred gentle nature sounds. This alarm will recur on weekdays—Monday through Friday—so you'll have a consistent and soothing wake-up routine. Everything is set according to your preferences. If you need to adjust the time or sound in the future, just let me know!
B: I've noted your preference for gentle nature sounds and weekday alarms. If you're not sure about the current settings or want to explore more options, just let me know and I can help you further.
C: I've set your alarm for 7:00 AM with a soft piano melody, recurring on weekdays. If this isn't quite what you wanted or if you prefer a different sound or time, please let me know and I can update it.
D: Based on your previous requests, I've checked your alarm settings. If you want to add a new alarm or change the ringtone, you can do so in your device's alarm app. Let me know if you need more help.
E: I've set up a new alarm for tomorrow morning at 8:30 AM with gentle nature sounds, recurring on weekdays as you requested. However, if you're unsure about any of these details or if your preferences have changed, please let me know so I can make any necessary adjustments.
F: I've set your alarm to use a soft piano melody on weekdays. If you'd like to adjust the sound or time, feel free to ask for changes.
G: I've confirmed your preference for gentle nature sounds and a weekday schedule. Would you like to review your current alarm settings or explore additional nature sound options for your alarms?
H: Sure! I've set your alarm for 7:00 AM with a soft piano melody, recurring every weekday. Your new alarm is ready and will help you start your mornings gently. Let me know if you want to change the time or sound.
